name: Roasted Onions
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Balsamic or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water, vinegar, and sugar in a bowl. Stir in the salt and pepper.
2. Pour the mixture into a Pam-sprayed baking pan.
3. Cut each onion lengthwise in half.
4. Place the cut sides of the onions down in the vinegar mixture.
5. Bake uncovered at 400°F (200°C) for about 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until the onions give easily when gently squeezed, most liquid has evaporated, and the cut sides are glazed.
6. Arrange the onions with the cut sides facing up on a platter.
